# Graph Report - thesis  (2026-05-19)

## Corpus Check
- 23318 files · ~19,108,590 words
- Verdict: corpus is large enough that graph structure adds value.

## Summary
- 172639 nodes · 263056 edges · 21669 communities (20074 shown, 1595 thin omitted)
- Extraction: 95% EXTRACTED · 5% INFERRED · 0% AMBIGUOUS · INFERRED: 13798 edges (avg confidence: 0.68)
- Token cost: 0 input · 0 output

## Graph Freshness
- Built from commit: `971bc51c`
- Run `git rev-parse HEAD` and compare to check if the graph is stale.
- Run `graphify update .` after code changes (no API cost).
